title: Immersive Ores
description: Immersive Ores mod adds new sets of tools, weapons, ores, and sets of armor.
body:
<center>
 
[![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/1051116089133777016?color=green&label=Discord&logo=Discord&logoColor=green&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/jVmUTGFMX5)  

![Immersive Ores Logo](https://imgur.com/K36CB9f.png)  

# **Immersive Ores**  
**Immersive Ores** expands the world of Minecraft by adding **three unique ores** – **Vibranium**, **Vulpus**, and **Enderium** – designed to completely change the way you explore caves, the Nether, and the End.  
The mod focuses on improving mining and progression, offering brand-new equipment and tools with a tiered upgrade system.  

</center>

---

## 🌍 Ores & Dimensions
- **Vibranium Ore** – Spawns **only in Deepslate layers** of the Overworld.
- **Vulpus Ore** – Found **at any Y-level** in the Nether.  
- **Enderium Ore** – Found **at any Y-level** in the End, including the islands.  

---


## 🌍 Rare Geodes  
You can also find rare geodes full of ores. These are a great way to get a lot of resources in one place.  

---

## ⚒️ New Equipment
Each ore can be used to craft:  
- **Full armor sets** (with increasing protection and durability)  
- **Standard tools** (pickaxe, axe, shovel, sword, hoe)  
- **Advanced tools** such as **paxel**, **hammer**, and **excavator**, perfect for large-scale mining.  

---

## 📈 Gear Progression  
To mine and use the ores, you need the following progression:  
- **Vibranium Ore** requires a **Netherite pickaxe** or better to mine.  
- **Vulpus Ore** requires tools made from **Vibranium** to mine.  
- **Enderium Ore** requires tools made from **Vulpus** to mine.  

To craft higher-tier armor, you must also **own and use the previous tier**:  
> Vibranium Armor → Vulpus Armor → Enderium Armor  

This system encourages exploration and rewards progression through the dimensions.  

---

## ⚙️ Additional Features

- Want to adjust **ore spawn rates**?  
Download this [DataPack](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/change-vein-size-immersive-ores) to easily change vein size and frequency.  
- Configurable: allow you to customize **all key values**, including tool stats, armor properties, and more for a better personalized gaming experience.

---

## 📌 Compatibility & Versions
- **Actively supported versions:** Minecraft 1.20.1, 1.21 and later  

---
